moments.title: Commonwealth Games Glasgow 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games officially begin today, July 23rd, in Glasgow, Scotland, with the opening ceremony at the OVO Hydro, running until August 2nd.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Excitement
angles.copy: Glasgow 2026 is officially OPEN! The Commonwealth Games begin today with the opening ceremony at the OVO Hydro. Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: Team UK Spirit
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games have officially begun in Glasgow! Get ready for 11 days of incredible sport and inspiring athletes from across the Commonwealth. Let's go, Team England, Scotland, Wales & Northern Ireland!

moments.title: The Hundred 2026 Heats Up Across the UK
moments.blurb: The Hundred 2026 cricket tournament continues today, July 23rd, with matches including Welsh Fire vs Southern Brave in Cardiff and London Spirit vs Manchester Super Giants at Lord's.

angles.name: Welsh Fire Match Day
angles.copy: It's match day for Welsh Fire! They take on Southern Brave today at Sophia Gardens in Cardiff as The Hundred continues. Who's heading down?

angles.name: National Cricket Action
angles.copy: The Hundred is in full swing! Catch all the fast-paced cricket action today with double-headers and big rivalries across the country. Who's your team?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Hold UK #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' remains at No. 1 on the UK Singles Chart for its 16th nonconsecutive week, a record for a British single not to reach the US Hot 100 top 10.

angles.name: #1 Reign Continues
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is #1 on the UK Singles Chart for a massive 16th week. Are you still playing it on repeat?

angles.name: British Chart Dominance
angles.copy: British talent dominating! Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's collaboration is still at the top of the UK charts. A huge achievement for UK music!

moments.title: World Cup Anthems Surge Up UK Chart
moments.blurb: Following England's semi-final exit from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, 'Wonderwall' by Oasis, 'Three Lions' by Baddiel, Skinner & The Lightning Seeds, and Shakira's official anthem 'Dai Dai' have surged into the UK Top 10.

angles.name: Footy Songs Back
angles.copy: World Cup fever may be cooling, but the anthems are red hot! Oasis' 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' are back in the UK Top 10. Which one's your singalong favourite?

angles.name: Chart Comebacks
angles.copy: The UK Singles Chart is alive with World Cup spirit! Classic football tunes have made a massive comeback into the Top 10 this week. Pure nostalgia!

moments.title: New Season of 'The Crow Girl' Airs Now
moments.blurb: The dark and emotionally charged mystery 'The Crow Girl', starring Eve Myles and Katherine Kelly, has returned for a new season on BBC/ITV.

angles.name: Must-Watch Mystery
angles.copy: Need a new crime drama fix? The critically acclaimed 'The Crow Girl' is back with a gripping new season starring Eve Myles and Katherine Kelly. Are you tuning in?

angles.name: TV Recommendations
angles.copy: If you love a dark, Scandi-noir inspired mystery, 'The Crow Girl' is essential viewing right now. What's your favourite TV detective series?

moments.title: ITV's 'The Dark' Thrills Viewers
moments.blurb: ITV's new atmospheric crime thriller 'The Dark', set in the Scottish countryside and starring Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale, is currently airing.

angles.name: Scottish Thriller
angles.copy: ITV's new crime thriller 'The Dark' is gripping viewers with its Scottish setting and twists! Have you been watching Laura Donnelly and Helen Baxendale in action?

angles.name: New TV Addiction
angles.copy: Looking for your next TV obsession? ITV's 'The Dark' is a slow-burning mystery packed with twists and a stellar cast. Get ready to be hooked!

moments.title: Netflix to Release 'The Bombing of Pan Am 103'
moments.blurb: The gripping historical drama 'The Bombing of Pan Am 103', co-produced by the BBC and Netflix, will be released globally on Netflix on July 30th.

angles.name: Upcoming Netflix Drama
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! The powerful new drama 'The Bombing of Pan Am 103' arrives on Netflix next week, July 30th. A must-watch historical series.

angles.name: True Story TV
angles.copy: If you're into true-story dramas, 'The Bombing of Pan Am 103' is coming to Netflix on July 30th. This BBC co-production looks incredibly compelling.

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday, Slash!
moments.blurb: Legendary Guns N' Roses guitarist Slash, born Saul Hudson, celebrates his 61st birthday today, July 23rd, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the iconic top hat-wearing guitar god, Slash! What's your favourite Guns N' Roses riff?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Raising a glass to a true rock legend! Slash from Guns N' Roses turns 61 today. His solos defined an era.

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, Jennifer Lopez!
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday tomorrow, July 24th, 2026.

angles.name: JLo's Big Day
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Tomorrow, July 24th, is Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday! What's your ultimate J.Lo dancefloor filler?

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: From the block to global icon! Wishing a very happy 57th birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez tomorrow!

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Mick Jagger!
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th, 2026.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger this Sunday! What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: The Ageless Icon
angles.copy: 83 and still rocking! Mick Jagger celebrates his birthday this weekend. A true legend of rock 'n' roll!

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday, Cher Lloyd!
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Cher Lloyd, known for hits like 'Swagger Jagger', celebrates her 33rd birthday on Tuesday, July 28th, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Throwback
angles.copy: Remember 'Swagger Jagger'? Cher Lloyd turns 33 this Tuesday! What's your favourite track from the X Factor star?

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 33rd birthday to Cher Lloyd on Tuesday! Still got her songs on your playlist?

moments.title: Happy 67th Birthday, Joe Elliott!
moments.blurb: Joe Elliott, the iconic lead singer of British rock band Def Leppard, celebrates his 67th birthday on Saturday, August 1st, 2026.

angles.name: Def Leppard Legend
angles.copy: Pour Some Sugar On Me! Def Leppard's legendary frontman Joe Elliott turns 67 this Saturday! What's your favourite track from the rock titans?

angles.name: 80s Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to Def Leppard's incredible vocalist, Joe Elliott, this weekend! Still rocking after all these years!

moments.title: Y Not? Festival Kicks Off Next Week
moments.blurb: The Y Not? Festival, a popular UK music festival, takes place next week from July 31st to August 2nd, 2026.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Y Not? Festival is just a week away! Kicking off July 31st, who's heading to Derbyshire for a weekend of music and good vibes?

angles.name: Summer Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Planning your summer festival season? Y Not? Festival is on from July 31st to August 2nd. Get ready for some amazing live music!
